scripts.dev:web:clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('apps/web/.next',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && npm run dev -w @learnova/web
scripts.dev:web:reset: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/web/.next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue" && npm run dev -w @learnova/web
